## Type of change

- [ ] Skill content
- [ ] Template/checklist/rubric
- [ ] Script or validation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release/log update

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/scan_factor_project.py .`
- [ ] `python -m py_compile scripts/*.py`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`, `RELEASE_NOTES.md`, and logs if versioned
